requirements.summary: Create a dedicated student profile page route at /profile where authenticated users can view and edit their complete profile information including name, email, and college details
acceptanceCriteria: Profile page is accessible via /profile route
Page displays current user profile information (name, email, college)
Page includes editable form fields for all profile properties
Form pre-populates with existing user data from useGetCallerUserProfile hook
Success message displays after successful profile update
Page redirects to login if user is not authenticated

file_operations.description: Create a new ProfilePage component at /profile route. This page displays the authenticated user's profile information in an editable form. Use useGetCallerUserProfile hook to fetch existing profile data and pre-populate form fields (name, email, college). Use useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation to save changes. Include loading states during data fetch and save operations. Show success message after successful profile update. Redirect to login page if user is not authenticated using useInternetIdentity hook. Use authorization component's authentication checks to ensure only logged-in users can access this page. Style the form consistently with existing app design using Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui form components.

Add a new route for /profile that renders the ProfilePage component. Register this route in the TanStack Router configuration alongside existing routes like /dashboard, /upload-note, etc. Ensure the route is protected and requires authentication by checking user identity state before rendering.

requirements.summary: Add a navigation link to the profile page in the Layout header navigation menu, positioned near the UserProfileDisplay component
acceptanceCriteria: Profile link appears in header navigation when user is authenticated
Link is visually consistent with existing navigation styling
Link is hidden when user is not logged in

file_operations.description: Add a Profile navigation link in the header navigation menu, positioned near the UserProfileDisplay component. The link should navigate to /profile route using TanStack Router Link component. Conditionally render this link only when user is authenticated (check useInternetIdentity hook's identity state). Style the link consistently with existing navigation items using Tailwind CSS classes. Position the link logically within the navigation structure, potentially between other authenticated-user menu items.

requirements.summary: Update the profile page UI to include form fields for the new customizable profile properties (bio, year of study, department) with appropriate input types and validation
acceptanceCriteria: Bio field uses textarea input with character limit (e.g., 300 characters)
Year of study uses dropdown or number input
All new fields are optional and clearly marked
Form validation provides helpful error messages
Save button remains disabled until form is valid

file_operations.description: Extend the ProfilePage form to include three new optional fields: bio (textarea with 300 character limit and character counter), yearOfStudy (text input or select dropdown with common values like 'First Year', 'Second Year', etc.), and department (text input). All three fields should be clearly marked as optional in the UI. Add client-side validation: bio limited to 300 characters, yearOfStudy and department accept text. Display validation error messages inline near each field. Disable the Save button until the form passes validation. These fields map to the optional bio, yearOfStudy, and department properties in the UserProfile type from the backend interface. Use shadcn/ui form components (Textarea, Input, Label) for consistent styling.
